title: BHAR + Simple Netherite Horse Armor Compat
description: Adds compatibility for Simple Netherite Horse Armor with Balanced Horse Armor Recipes
body:
**[Balanced Horse Armor Recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bhar) + [Simple Netherite Horse Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-netherite-horse-armor) Compat**

## This datapack has been archived due to [Simple Netherite Horse Armor 2.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-netherite-horse-armor/version/2w99fAyt) adding built-in recipes for upgrading diamond armors.
